title: AN ACT CREATING BARRIO SARAWAGAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SALUG, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 16957 / 65 OG No. 47, 13022 (November 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5579, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT CREATING BARRIO SARAWAGAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SALUG, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Sarawagan in Barrio Balakan, Municipality of Salug, Province of Zamboanga del Norte, is separated from said barrio and converted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality, to be known as Barrio Sarawagan. The barrio of Sarawagan shall be bounded as follows:

NorthâStarting from the corner of Lot No. 4014- 4013-2891-4005-3213-3212-3211, 3294-S291-3290-3270 and 3268;

EastâSalug River and Guisapong Creek;

SouthâStarting from corner of Lot 2908, going clockwise proceed to Lot No. 2895, 2907, 2906, 2905, 2904, 2903, 3362, 3363, 3409, 3405, and 3404;

WestâCoyong and Sarawagan Creeks.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1969.
